name: Special Education
student_summary: Teach children with diverse learning needs — deeply human work.
overview: Teach children with diverse learning needs — deeply human work. Special Education sits in the Teaching family of Education & Training. It is a broad career direction — you can enter it through several routes and specialize later without restarting.
who_is_this_for: You feel fulfilled when your work directly helps someone
Explaining things so others finally get it satisfies you
who_should_avoid: You strongly prefer solitary desk work over this field's day-to-day reality
daily_responsibilities: Apply individualized education plans to real problems
Collaborate with your team using assistive methods
Keep improving at behaviour support — the field keeps moving
Communicate progress, results and decisions to the people who depend on them
work_environment: Hospitals, clinics and care settings — human contact all day
problem_solving_style: People-centred — listen, mediate, guide and align humans
scope: Demand outlook in India is booming; see FAQs for how the platform keeps this current.
advantages: Demand is booming: opportunities across India and beyond
A broad Teaching foundation that opens multiple specializations later
challenges: Early years demand patience before the rewards compound
misconceptions: “You must pick your exact job title now.” Special Education is a direction — specialization comes later.
“Only toppers make it.” Consistent skill-building beats one exam rank in the long run.
portfolio_ideas: A project demonstrating individualized education plans
A documented case study of assistive methods
projects: Beginner: explore individualized education plans with a small self-chosen project
Intermediate: build or run something real using Assistive tech

faqs: What does Special Education pay in India?
Entry roles typically start around ₹3 LPA and senior professionals reach ₹10 LPA or more. Live, region-specific salary data is retrieved by the platform when you ask.
What should I study after Class 12?
Focus on Psychology, Biology. Typical degrees: B.Ed Special Education (RCI recognized). Alternatives exist: any degree + b.ed.
Will AI take over this career?
AI impact is minimal — deeply human/physical work. Broad paths like Special Education evolve rather than disappear — the students who pair domain skill with AI tools benefit most.
Is this a broad path or a specific job?
Special Education is a career direction. Once inside it you can specialize further — the platform will map specializations in future versions.
